<p class="key-answer" data-question="Carfilzomib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Carfilzomib</strong> 目前有 <strong>31 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Carfilzomib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Kyprolis in combination with daratumumab and dexamethasone, with lenalidomide and dexamethasone, or with dexamethasone alone is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with multiple myeloma who...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>CMM7（99.4%）</li>
<li>pediatric leptomeningeal melanoma（99.3%）</li>
<li>epithelioid cell uveal melanoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>vulvar melanoma (disease)（99.2%）</li>
<li>melanoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>indolent plasma cell myeloma（97.9%）</li>
<li>intellectual disability, autosomal dominant 55, with seizures（97.8%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（97.4%）</li>
<li>myeloid leukemia（97.0%）</li>
<li>neutrophil immunodeficiency syndrome（95.1%）</li>
<li>central nervous system melanocytic neoplasm（93.3%）</li>
<li>ganglioneuroblastoma (disease)（87.5%）</li>
<li>retroperitoneal neoplasm（86.0%）</li>
<li>vertebral anomalies and variable endocrine and T-cell dysfunction（85.0%）</li>
<li>cecum villous adenoma（83.9%）</li>
<li>cecum neuroendocrine tumor G1（83.2%）</li>
<li>lipoma of colon（83.1%）</li>
<li>cecal disease（82.9%）</li>
<li>rectosigmoid junction neoplasm（82.9%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of cecum（82.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
